what_was_built: tools/crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py (stdlib-only QA runtime tool implementing the Bundle 14 QA / Freeze spec; reads an operator-supplied frozen dataset directory and emits a qa_report.json populating all 26 fields declared by Bundle 14's QA_report_schema + a human-readable qa_report.md; CLI: validate-spec / show-spec / run --dataset-dir <PATH> --out-dir <PATH>; 7 check groups A-G; 6-status QA model; conservative classifier (QA_PASS is the natural deterministic outcome of mechanical checks but does NOT autoauthorize backtests))

tests/test_crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py (39 tests using tmp_path synthetic fixtures only; covers stdlib-only AST scan; no-network / no-broker / no-exchange / no-credentials / no-subprocess; no order-placement code; validate-spec / show-spec / run CLI; missing/empty dataset-dir safe-fails; per-check-group failure modes for A through G; 26-field schema all populated; safety flags pinned False; QA_PASS / QA_WARN / QA_FAIL / QA_BLOCKED classification; sha256 tamper detection; missing FREEZE_RECORD detection; missing fees / slippage detection; determinism on same input; report files land at out_dir; no real data files committed under bundle dir; no data/crypto_d1_research/ created; integration with prior validators)
files_NOT_changed: tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py (NOT modified -- the QA tool is code, not evidence; lane stays WATCH unchanged at 29 source_reports)
tools/strategy_next_bundle.py (NOT modified -- no artificial selection nudge)
app.py and templates/*.html (NOT touched; clean since 7cecf31)
All 7 prior Crypto-D1 spec docs + 8 arbitrage validators NOT modified
data/crypto_d1_research/ NOT created (the tool reads only from --dataset-dir; if absent emits a QA_DRAFT or QA_FAIL report)

follows_qa_freeze_spec.phase_satisfied: P2_dataset_manifest_freeze runtime layer -- this is the code Bundle 14 specified; it does NOT acquire data, does NOT run backtests, and does NOT authorize trading. It is a deterministic checker only.

how_to_run_with_local_dataset.step_1_prepare_dataset: Operator (per Bundle 17 manual steps) places under <DATASET_DIR>: BTC_daily.csv (and optionally ETH_daily.csv, SOL_daily.csv), manifest.json (passes crypto_d1_dataset_manifest_check.py), CHECKSUMS.txt (one '<sha256_hex>  <filename>' line per dataset file), FREEZE_RECORD.txt (key:value lines with freeze_timestamp_utc + operator + 6 version pins), fees.json (declaring per-venue taker fee + slippage_bps + optional spread_proxy_bps).
how_to_run_with_local_dataset.step_5_inspect_reports: OUT_DIR contains qa_report.json (26 required fields) and qa_report.md. NEVER commit OUT_DIR contents unless explicitly authorized.
how_to_run_with_local_dataset.step_6_iterate_on_failures: On QA_FAIL, remediation requires a NEW dataset_version (per Bundle 13 freeze rules). On QA_WARN, operator attaches an acceptance note to the manifest before any backtest plan references the dataset.

what_happens_if_no_data_exists.behavior: If --dataset-dir does not exist, emit QA_DRAFT with empty groups and explicit reason in _audit_context.no_input_reason. If --dataset-dir exists but contains no CSV, emit QA_FAIL with blocking failure 'no .csv files in dataset_dir'. JSON + MD reports are still written for audit.
what_happens_if_no_data_exists.guarantee: Never fabricates a qa_report. Never invents check results. Never auto-creates data/crypto_d1_research/.

what_was_executed_in_this_bundle: ONLY the test suite, against tmp_path synthetic CSV / manifest / CHECKSUMS / FREEZE_RECORD / fees fixtures generated inside the tests. NO real dataset was loaded or QA-checked.

candidate_registry_status_for_crypto_d1_.registry_NOT_modified_by_this_bundle: Per Bundle 16 precedent, the QA tool is code, not evidence. The candidate_registry seed's extra_files were not extended; lane stays WATCH at 29 source_reports. Promotion to ACTIVE still requires a future per-strategy backtest report PASS verdict on REAL data + explicit operator decision.
guardrails_held: never STRONG evidence in the auto-build path
no real data files or QA output files created in this bundle
no real QA run executed against real data

recommended_next_bundle: **Operator step (NOT a bundle):** operator MANUALLY executes Bundle 17 steps 1-10 (choose source class A/B/C/D, acquire CSV offline, normalize header to Bundle 12 schema, mint dataset_id + version, place files under data/crypto_d1_research/<dataset_id>/<dataset_version>/, author manifest.json, compute CHECKSUMS.txt, write FREEZE_RECORD.txt), then run `python tools/crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py run --dataset-dir <PATH> --out-dir <PATH>` and review the emitted qa_report.json + qa_report.md. SPARTA does NOT automate any of these steps.

**Crypto-D1 Baseline Results Report v1** (separately authorized; only AFTER operator has supplied data, run the QA tool to QA_PASS or accepted QA_WARN, and run the backtest runner to produce output; documents the operator-reviewed run + pins verdict + caveats. Spec bundle; Claude works.)

**Crypto-D1 Backtest Runner v2 (future)** -- walk-forward + per-family parameter sweep + structured sensitivity sweep + per-strategy report emitter matching the full 27-field Bundle 15 schema. (Code bundle; recommend Codex.)
